title: Plan-revision lineage fields — positive and regression cases
description: Validates that revision_of is required by policy for new artifact supersession, same-path in-place updates omit revision_of, and iter-1 plans without revision_of still validate (optional-field regression guard).

inputs.label: planner-plan-with-new-artifact-supersession
inputs.description: Positive case: a planner plan produced under revision_mode: new_artifact_supersession carries revision_of pointing to the prior plan artifact. Schema must accept it and policy requires it.

input.context: Orchestrator incremented iteration_index to 2 and issued revision_mode: new_artifact_supersession with existing_plan_path. Planner produces a revised plan with revision_of set.

expected.must_not: revision_of absent when plan supersedes a prior iteration

inputs.label: planner-in-place-update-same-plan-path
inputs.description: Positive case: ordinary PLAN_REVIEW fixes update the active plan path in place and do not require revision_of.

input.context: Orchestrator sent revision_mode: in_place_update for review findings PA-MAJOR-1 and AV-BLOCKING-2.
input.revision_request: Address PA-MAJOR-1 and AV-BLOCKING-2 in the active plan path; do not inline the prior plan body.

expected.must_not: revision_of required for same-path in-place update

inputs.label: iter-1-plan-without-revision-of
inputs.description: Regression guard: an iter-1 plan that omits revision_of must still validate — the field is optional.

input.context: First-iteration plan with no prior predecessor.

expected.must_not: schema reject a plan that omits the optional revision_of field

assertions: revision_of is optional: iter-1 plans and same-path in-place updates without it remain schema-valid.
new_artifact_supersession_requires_revision_of: revision_of is a string when present, pointing to a prior plan path.
Schema additionalProperties: false is honored — no undeclared fields slip in.
